item.title:
Coral: Bruce Millington reposteó Coral @Coral · 19h 𝐆𝐞𝐭 𝐌𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐜𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐡!
We invited Sean Bowen & Brendan Powell to a photoshoot
Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 17min Schauffele was going great until the final few holes. Disappointing finish 176
item.description: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 17min Schauffele was going great until the final few holes. Disappointing finish 176

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h O’Neil interview with employee as you’d expect: evasive, defensive, loaded with nonsense. T
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h O’Neil interview with employee as you’d expect: evasive, defensive, loaded with nonsense. The interesting line was plan to ‘blend a version of LIV and the national opens’. Note DPWT has Irish, Scottish, French, Dutch, Italy, Spanish, Australia, South Africa, China, India, Kenya. 4 14 2 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf So it’s either try to take over some of these events or try t
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 1h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf So it’s either try to take over some of these events or try to deal with DPWT. This ‘plan’ is likely very new: they were not planning for PIF funding to be taken away. He was not asked who is going to pay to renew Bryson’s contract, and how prize money might be affected. 1 6 1 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 58min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf As for ‘anonymous sources’ complaint, pure gaslighting. If
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 58min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf As for ‘anonymous sources’ complaint, pure gaslighting. If you want to complain about anonymous sources (which have brought down governments btw), you first have to discredit the story. Not once has he done that. All in all a pretty pathetic, state-sponsored (for now) spectacle. 1 2 9 1 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3h #DISCUSSION: Without telling us your handicap, what's a line you say at least 20 times every
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3h #DISCUSSION: Without telling us your handicap, what's a line you say at least 20 times every round? 749 50 232 128 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 5h If you can make it through the drivel, you'll hear O'Neil mention the volume of "unnamed s
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 5h If you can make it through the drivel, you'll hear O'Neil mention the volume of "unnamed sources" in the reporting yesterday, but not actually deny the merits of the reports.
A similar message to his email yesterday. Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 6h Scott O’Neil was on the LIV broadcast earlier and hit a number of topics. 47 12 368 108 mil
